plan.failureSummary: The test assertion failed because the resulting URL contains a hash fragment (#playwright-check-suite) which was not included in the expected string.
observedIndicators: Assertion mismatch: expected base URL, received URL with hash fragment.
The page.ai step completed successfully before the assertion failure.
Persistent failure streak of 6 runs suggests a permanent change in site behavior.

remediationSteps.summary: Update URL assertion to account for hash fragments.
remediationSteps.details: Update the assertion on line 13 of checkly.test.ts to include the hash fragment '#playwright-check-suite' or use a regex/partial match (e.g., .toContain() or .toMatch()) to allow for anchors.

plan.notes: The AI successfully followed instructions to search and select a specific result. The website's search result now links directly to a page section (anchor), causing the URL to include a hash. The test assertion is too strict and needs to be updated.
